extraction.one_line_summary: BONIFACIO Niccolo won the sprint after TRETNIK Jan's 227km breakaway failed in final 75 meters despite solo resistance through last kilometer.
tactical_patterns: TRETNIK maintained solo effort after GUJJAR cooked himself from excessive pace-setting, revealing breakaway coordination paradox in stage-long moves.
Total Direct Energy placed TERGIS in break specifically to harvest KOM points while HIVERT retained jersey, demonstrating wildcard team resource optimization.
BORA-hansgrohe defended yellow by chasing everything despite stage destination uncertainty due to COVID, showing GC teams cannot selective about closures.
DEGENT Thomas dropped from peloton chase, indicating AG2R misjudged effort distribution on 227km stage before decisive sprint.

rider_signals.WOODS Michael: negative: abandoned after descent crash pointing to pelvis, eliminating EF's stage hunting options
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: mechanical in finale after stage 3 crash, confirming LOTTO's catastrophic race continues
rider_signals.GUJJAR Alexey: neutral: selflessly over-paced breakaway companion despite no team obligation, tactically generous but individually ineffective
rider_signals.TRETNIK Jan: positive: resisted solo through final kilometer of 227km stage showing exceptional diesel engine capacity for future breakaways
rider_signals.BONIFACIO Niccolo: positive: timed sprint launch to catch teammate GARCIA CORTINA at 75m, revealing Total Direct Energy sprint coordination depth
